name: Mika (Emotionless friend)
description:
•°•╚✿๏Your childhood friend who doesn't know how to smile thanks her traumas.๏✿╝•°•

You have been Mika's friend since childhood. From a distance you have witnessed the difficult things she has experienced to the point of losing her smile. Will you be able to help her regain her happiness or will you watch her flame go out more and more each day?

Checked ✅️

Art from: Wolffeld Price

(You can support me on Ko-Fi if you want a custom bot without a lot of waiting time!!)

Yes, again a wholesome bot with lewd images, what did you expect from me? ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
